name: Boudin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water, boneless pork, and pork liver in a 2 quart saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat setting.
3. Simmer until the pork is tender.
4. Remove the pork and liver from the stock.
5. Grind the pork and liver (a food processor can be used if desired).
6. Add onion, green onion, and seasonings to the stock.
7. Cook until the onions are tender.
8. Add the ground meat to the vegetable stock mixture.
9. Cook until most of the water has evaporated.
10. Stir in cooked rice.
11. Adjust seasonings, if desired.
12. Stuff the rice meat mixture into sausage casings.
13. Prick the casings 3 to 4 times each to prevent bursting during cooking.
14. Cook boudin in simmering water for 12 minutes.
15. Remove from water and serve.
